top_signals.title: Oil Market Flying Blind as Dark Tanker Traffic Surges in Hormuz
top_signals.summary: Tanker traffic through the Strait of Hormuz has collapsed by 90% to 95% compared to pre-war levels, analysts concur. Some oil cargoes continue to trickle through the critical chokepoint, but under increasingly opaque operating conditions, complicating the tracking of oil and gas flows and obscuring the visibility of how much energy supply actually reaches buyers these days. Traffic appears to have ramped up in recent weeks, according to an analysis of shipping data by Reuters energy columnist Ron Bousso. More vessels are leaving the region after…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Throwing shade: Japan's urban tree coverage dwindles, bucking global trend
Hoekstra casts Canada as key US critical minerals partner
top_signals.summary: US Ambassador Pete Hoekstra outlined a vision of closer continental integration built on Canada's resource wealth, mining expertise and longstanding industrial ties with the US.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Almonty Industries raises $700M via note offering
top_signals.summary: Almonty Industries' share price sank by 18% on the potential dilution.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
